<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
  const currentEl = document.querySelector('.js-current');
  const totalEl = document.querySelector('.js-total');
  const thumbEls = document.querySelectorAll('.js-photo-thumbs .swiper-slide');

  if (!thumbEls.length) return;

  totalEl.textContent = thumbEls.length;

  const thumbSwiper = new Swiper('.js-photo-thumbs', {
    slidesPerView: 'auto',
    spaceBetween: 10,
    speed: 600,
    watchSlidesProgress: true
  });

  const mainSwiper = new Swiper('.js-photo-main', {
    slidesPerView: 1,
    speed: 600,
    rewind: true,
    autoplay: {
      delay: 3000,
      disableOnInteraction: false
    },
    navigation: {
      nextEl: '.photo_gallery__arrow--next',
      prevEl: '.photo_gallery__arrow--prev'
    },
    on: {
      init: function () {
        updateThumbState(this.activeIndex);
      },
      slideChange: function () {
        updateThumbState(this.activeIndex);
      }
    }
  });

  function updateThumbState(index) {
    currentEl.textContent = index + 1;

    thumbEls.forEach(function (el) {
      el.classList.remove('is-active');
    });

    if (thumbEls[index]) {
      thumbEls[index].classList.add('is-active');
      thumbSwiper.slideTo(index);
    }
  }

  thumbEls.forEach(function (thumb, index) {
    thumb.addEventListener('click', function () {
      mainSwiper.slideTo(index);
    });
  });
});
</script>
